title: cleanup: remove obsolete Enter scripts
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes the broken formatted `npm run tail` path and its stale `scripts/format-logs.ts` helper.
- Deletes the unreferenced regex-only dead-code scanner and unused scripts tsconfig.
- Deletes the stale app URL checker that requires missing `apps_urls.csv` and fails under Enter ESM.
- Deletes old manual shell smoke scripts now covered by real tests.
- Net diff: 7 files, 625 deletions.

Evidence:
- `rg -n "format-logs|"tail"|find-dead-code|check-app-urls|apps_urls\.csv|test-image-tracking|test-logging|scripts/tsconfig" ...` found no Enter refs after deletion.
- `node src/tier-progression/shared/check-app-urls.js` failed before deletion because `require` is unavailable in Enter ESM.
- `scripts/format-logs.ts` imported nonexistent `../src/logger.ts`.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/package.json`
- `npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `npm run build:frontend --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `npm run test --workspace pollinations-enter -- test/events.test.ts test/track-image.test.ts` (13 tests)
- `git diff --check origin/main`

Note: validation used temporary symlinks to the existing local dependency tree; they were removed before commit.

gist.headline: Spring Cleaning the Hive
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning in the Enter codebase, sweeping away old, broken scripts to keep our workspace tidy.
gist.summary: Removed 625 lines of obsolete developer scripts from the Enter service, including broken log formatters, dead-code scanners, and old smoke tests.
gist.impact: Developers get a cleaner, more maintainable codebase with fewer broken or unused tools cluttering the repository.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old, dusty scrolls or papers (representing obsolete scripts) while Polly the bee sweeps up with a tiny broom.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a stack of dusty, old paper scrolls representing obsolete code scripts. Polly the bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny maid's bandana, holding a small broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
